title: The Last Cars Are Cut Away
description: The chaos around the Sea Train reaches its final stretch before the crew and allies hit Enies Lobby head-on.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this part follows Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Sanji, Nico Robin. The chaos around the Sea Train reaches its final stretch before the crew and allies hit Enies Lobby head-on.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: These are the agents of justice...?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: They're way more evil than us...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Her problem is beyond your understanding.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: for the sake of the world.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: to harvest all of nice Nico Robin's...

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Wait! Nico Robin! Don't go in there!!

summary: The chaos around the Sea Train reaches its final stretch before the crew and allies hit Enies Lobby head-on.
